description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.5.2: Hotfix — post-copy plugin verification + dual-path Windows install. New _install_plugin_file() helper with post-copy size check and manual read/write fallback for OneDrive/antivirus interference. Dual-path installation on Windows: copies to both ~/.config/opencode/plugins and %APPDATA%/opencode/plugins as fallback. CLI only, no server-side changes.
